g.text: Enter your details to join the session

input.style: background:var(--panel); color:var(--text); border:1px solid var(--border); padding:10px; font-family:monospace; font-size:16px; border-radius:6px; width:100%; box-sizing:border-box;

g.text: Discuss: What is the strongest argument for each side?
TABLE NOTES — shared with your table

textarea.style: background:var(--bg); color:var(--text); border:1px solid var(--border); padding:6px; font-family:monospace; font-size:11px; border-radius:4px; width:100%; height:100%; box-sizing:border-box; resize:none;

input.style: background:var(--panel); color:var(--text); border:1px solid var(--border); padding:10px; font-family:monospace; font-size:16px; border-radius:6px; width:100%; box-sizing:border-box;
